summary: The options suggest general safe handling procedures. However, only one does not fit current understanding due to its claim of ongoing chemical reaction post-application which contradicts known properties of cured materials like these restoratives where significant exothermic reactions occur immediately upon activation but cease shortly thereafter without further external energy input needed afterwards as implied by "up-to" language used inaccurately
